steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks how the UK's decline compares to other nations. The table provides percent change values, which allow fair comparison across countries with different baseline hours.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: reverses one or more comparisons relative to the table data. ✗
  • Choice B: UK declined 24% — less than Germany (44%) but greater than Australia (21%) and Mexico (7%) — exactly matches the data. ✓
  • Choice C: switches to absolute hours rather than percent change, making the comparison invalid. ✗
  • Choice D: incorrectly claims UK rose instead of declined. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
